Petition For Approval Of Fees And Costs Advanced And For Discharge Of Melanie J. Emmons As Guardian Ad Litem Of Michael Gregory Morris
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-05-2023 Continued To Feb-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nora Aponte-Woodring, in court, for and with, Verna Shaheen, Petitioner; Melanie J. Emmons, via Zoom, Guardian ad Litem, for Minor Heirs; Don Emley, via Zoom, for Laura Krause, Decedent's former spouse.

The court acknowledges that there are no objections to the instant petition and confirms that Ms. Kraus has obtained probate counsel with the plan to petition to appoint a guardian of the Estate.

The petition is granted in open court. Verna Shaheen is appointed Administrator of the Estate with Full Authority. Bond in the amount of $954,000 is required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-05-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Yang. Not Reported.
